definition.en: The whole self is entire, and every individual innately knows and is intimately familiar with the intents and purposes of the whole self.
definition.zh: 整个自己是完整的，每个个体天生就知道并熟悉整个自己的意图和目的。

definition.en: The whole self is obviously the sum of these characteristics, and more.
definition.zh: 整个自己显然是这些特征的总和，并且不止于此。

definition.en: The whole self is not bound by any system.
definition.zh: 整个自己不受任何系统的束缚。

definition.en: The whole self is more than the sum of its parts; and also, since it is action, it is never the same.
definition.zh: 整个自己大于其各部分的总和；而且，由于它是行动，它从不相同。

definition.en: The whole self is not only the sum of the personality as you know it in your time, it is also the sum of what it has been and what it shall be.
definition.zh: 整个自己不仅是你在你们时间里所知道的人格的总和，它也是它过去和未来所是的一切的总和。

explanation: 「完整自我」是超越时空限制的、多维度的整体存在。它并非人格的简单总和，而是包含了所有过去、现在与未来的面向，同时感知无限个瞬间点。在物理现实中，我们通常只体验到完整自我的一个微小部分——即外我（ego），它专注于处理物质世界的生存与操控，如同被催眠般深信物质实相是唯一真实。然而，完整自我始终知晓一切，并通过梦境、直觉和未言明的思绪，让个体逐渐认识它。完整自我兼具男性和女性特质，在完成所有转世后，这些特质会完美融合，让真正的身份得以浮现。它不受任何系统的束缚，持续处于流动、学习和发展的状态。外我之所以难以触及完整自我，主要是因为它固执地拒绝承认更广阔的实相。只有当外我达到足够的自信，

quotes.text: It turns beams of attention off and on. It has many facets and many volumes and many dimensions. It acts out roles, but the whole self is entire, and every individual innately knows and is intimately familiar with the intents and purposes of the whole self. And in dreams and in intuitions and unspoken thoughts, the individual comes to terms with the whole self, of which it is merely one portion, and not necessarily the dominant portion.
quotes.translation: 它反复开关注意力的光束。它拥有众多面向、众多层次与众多维度。它扮演各种角色，但整体自性是完整的，每个个体天生知晓并深切熟悉整体自性的意图与目的。在梦境、直觉与未说出口的思绪中，个体与整体自性达成和解——个体仅是整体自性的一部分，且未必是主导部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The whole self is obviously the sum of these characteristics, and more. After the final incarnation, the physical, sexual type of creativity is simply no longer needed. You do not need to reproduce physically, in other words. In simple terms the whole self contains male and female characteristics, finely tuned together, blended so that true identity can then arise -- for it cannot, when one group of characteristics must be emphasized over the other group, as it must be during your present physical existence.
quotes.translation: 整体自性显然是这些特性的总和，且远不止于此。在最终转世之后，物质与性别的创造力便不再需要。换言之，你无需再进行物质层面的繁衍。简单来说，整体自性包含精心调和的男性与女性特质，两者交融后真正的身份方能显现——因为当一组特质必须被强调而压制另一组时（正如你们当前物质存在中必须如此），真正的身份便无法诞生。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You can within them often perceive both your past and present simultaneously, but this has always been a characteristic of the whole self in any case. The whole self is not bound by any system. At various times more of the abilities of the whole self intrude, so to speak, upon the ego system. You then become conscious of action that escaped you earlier. This often occurs with the help of the dream state.
quotes.translation: 你常能在其中同时感知过去与现在，但这始终是整体自性的特性。整体自性不受任何系统束缚。在不同时刻，整体自性的更多能力会"侵入"自我系统。你于是意识到先前未能察觉的行动。这常借助梦境状态实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The inner ego directs all activities which are deeply subjective. The outer ego as you know deals with the manipulation of the self in the physical environment. You must remember that the whole self is more than the sum of its parts; and also, since it is action, it is never the same. It is therefore impossible at any moment to pinpoint the personality. Therefore the whole self is not only the sum of the personality as you know it in your time, it is also the sum of what it has been and what it shall be. For as I have explained action is simultaneous, and time as you think of it is caused by your own physical perception.
quotes.translation: 内在自我主导所有深层主观活动。你所知的外在自我则负责在物质环境中操控自身。必须谨记：整体自性大于其部分之和；同时，由于它是行动本身，它永不相同。因此任何时刻都无法精准定位人格。整体自性不仅是你时间认知中的人格总和，更是其过去与未来状态的总和。正如我所解释的，行动是同时性的，而你所认为的时间实由自身物质感知所创造。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The book was a first attempt in forming a definite pattern of the material that he was receiving from the inner senses. He was beginning to recognize the whole self. The only reason the whole self is not much more conscious and accessible is your own stubborn refusal to admit it. I cannot emphasize this more strongly. The camouflage pattern world is formed by the mind, and I am using this now in its true term as a part of the inner world. Energy is received by the mind through the inner senses and transformed by use of mental enzymes into camouflage patterns.
quotes.translation: 这本书是首次尝试将内在感官接收的材料构建成明确模式。他开始认知整体自性。整体自性之所以未能更清晰可及，唯一原因在于你固执地拒绝承认它。我无法更强调这一点。伪装模式世界由心智构建——此处我使用其真实含义，即作为内在世界的一部分。能量通过内在感官被心智接收，再经由心智酶转化为伪装模式。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: But the outer ego as you know is that portion of the whole self that is given over to the maintenance of physical manipulations, and it perceives only through those physical equipment, those outer senses. It sees its dominion in jeopardy and rises up in arms. It, the ego, is that small portion of the whole self which the whole self has allowed to be completely, or almost completely, bewitched by the self-hypnotic trance. It is that portion which believes implicitly in the given specifications of the hypnotist, and as such it will be last to leave the trance.
quotes.translation: 但你所知的外在自我，是整体自性中负责维持物质操作的那部分，它仅通过物质装备与外在感官进行感知。当它察觉自身领域岌岌可危时，便会武装反抗。这个自我，是整体自性允许其完全（或几乎完全）被自我催眠状态迷惑的那一小部分。它盲目相信催眠师设定的特定规则，因此将是最后脱离催眠状态的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The soul or entity is always in a state of flux, or learning, and of developments that have to do with subjective experience rather than with time or space. This is not nearly as mysterious as it might sound. Each of my readers plays a game in which the egotistical conscious self pretends not to know what the whole self definitely does know. Since the ego is definitely a part of the whole self, then it must necessarily be basically aware of such knowledge. In its intense focus in physical reality, however, it pretends not to know, until it feels able to utilize the information in physical terms.
quotes.translation: 灵魂或本体始终处于流动、学习与发展的状态，这些发展关乎主观体验而非时间或空间。这并不像听起来那么神秘。我的每位读者都在玩一个游戏：自我意识的小我假装不知道整体自我确知的一切。既然小我无疑是整体自我的一部分，那么它必然在根本上知晓这些知识。然而，当小我强烈聚焦于物质实相时，它假装不知，直到它感觉能够以物质形式运用这些信息为止。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The portrait that you sent to the gallery is evocative. It continues to grow. It is not completely at the mercy of a completed camouflage. The whole self is never completely constructed on your plane. At best it finds expression now and then. A camouflage plane, merely by being what it is, makes it impossible for the whole self to find expression. There is almost hypnotic focus of energy for a particular time for a particular reason.
quotes.translation: 你寄给画廊的那幅肖像画具有唤起性。它仍在生长。它并未完全受制于已完成的伪装。整体自我从未在你的层面上被完全构建。它至多只能偶尔找到表达方式。伪装层面仅仅因其本质，就使整体自我无法充分表达。能量几乎像催眠般聚焦于特定时间、特定原因。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The relative, neutral passivity is attained as various portions of the whole self once more collect together. The acceleration, which is mental, begins as those divergent portions of the whole self-interact. This is an electromagnetic sequence or action that will eventually help provide the impetus for projection of the whole self into another field of actuality, as the rate of acceleration increases and becomes more unified.
quotes.translation: 当整体自我的各个部分重新聚合时，便达到相对中性的被动状态。当整体自我那些分散的部分开始互动时，心智层面的加速便启动了。这是一种电磁序列或作用，随着加速率增加并趋于统一，最终将帮助提供动力，使整体自我投射到另一个实相场域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: "Seth's data and my own on counterparts make sense to me. I feel (as Seth mentioned in the 721st session) that I wasn't Nebene, or two different Roman soldiers per se, but rather that my whole self chose to manifest such personalities together; that I, too, am such a manifestation at a "later" time, then, and that from my own vantage point I can tune in to those other lives. But I question, at least provisionally, any idea of past or counterpart lives that I lived one hundred percent. At this writing, I think that I am living my only one hundred percent life now, with the privilege of occasionally being able to focus upon scattered portions of those other existences emanating from my whole self, which has its basic reality outside of our space-time concepts.10
quotes.translation: "赛斯关于对应人物的资料以及我自己的理解对我而言是合理的。我感觉（正如赛斯在第721节提到的）我并非内贝内，也不是两个不同的罗马士兵本身，而是我的整体自我选择同时显化这些人格；我自己在'后来'的时间点也是这样的显化，因此从我的有利位置，我可以调频到那些其他生命。但我至少暂时质疑任何关于我百分之百经历过的前世或对应人生的概念。在写作这一刻，我认为我正在经历我唯一百分之百的人生，同时享有偶尔聚焦于那些从我整体自我（其基本实相存在于我们时空概念之外）散发出的其他存在之零散片段的特权。"
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (FOR SESSION 724)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The personality is not the whole self. It is a portion of the whole self, which is activated during a particular existence. The ego, as I have explained, does not vanish. However, it must always be remembered here that the ego is not the self-conscious self in its entirety by any means. It is simply a portion, a field of focus whereby the self attempts to objectify itself within the world of matter.
quotes.translation: 人格并非整体自我。它是整体自我的一部分，在特定存在期间被激活。如我所解释的，小我并未消失。然而，必须始终记住：小我绝非完整的自我意识本身。它仅仅是自我试图在物质世界中客观化自身的一个部分、一个聚焦场域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is only the ego that steps from moment to moment, as a man who walks from puddle to puddle. It is only the ego who drowns in time. Therefore, since only the ego is momentarily imprisoned within the focus of your plane, it is only the ego who probes so slowly into simultaneous action, perceiving it bit by bit and sip by sip. So now you will see what I meant when I spoke about the limitless self, for the whole self is not so bound. The whole self could and does perceive a limitless number of such moment points simultaneously. And now hear this:
quotes.translation: 只有小我像从水坑走到水坑的人那样，一步接一步地移动。只有小我沉溺于时间之中。因此，既然只有小我暂时被囚禁于你层面的聚焦中，那么也只有小我会如此缓慢地探索同时性行动，一点一滴地感知它。现在你将明白我谈及无限自我时的含义——因为整体自我不受此束缚。整体自我能够且确实同时感知无限数量的此类时刻点。现在请听好：
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Only when a certain level of confidence is reached can the outer ego afford to become familiar with these inner workings, at least on your plane. Otherwise you would falter. As a rule, even though the whole self is capable of organizing the data from all of the inner senses, the subconscious can rarely receive such communications full blast; and the outer ego, concerned as it is with camouflage pattern, and really born to deal with camouflage pattern, simply could not stand the shock of realization that a complete set of inner senses would bring.
quotes.translation: 只有当外在自我达到某种程度的自信时，它才能开始熟悉这些内在运作——至少在你的层面上是如此。否则你会步履蹒跚。通常来说，即使整体自体能够组织所有内在感官的数据，潜意识也极少能全盘接收这类讯息；而专注于伪装模式、且生来就是为了处理伪装模式的外在自我，根本无法承受内在感官全套运作所带来的认知冲击。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The fact is that the whole self is constantly experiencing data from all of the inner senses. The inner ego is of course aware of this. The subconscious is sometimes aware of this, and the outer ego is aware of very little. I have explained the reasons for this in past sessions. The outer ego must concentrate much of its energy toward survival in and manipulation of the outer camouflage world. This world has already been created by the inner self, and its continuing existence is determined by the constant vigilance of the inner self.
quotes.translation: 事实上，整体自体始终在接收所有内在感官的数据。内在自我当然知晓这一点。潜意识有时也能觉察，而外在自我则所知甚少。我在过去的课程中解释过其中缘由。外在自我必须将大部分能量集中于外在伪装世界的生存与操控。这个世界早已由内在自体创造，其持续存在取决于内在自体的持续警觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The whole self slowly regains knowledge of its own reincarnations, and learns of its relationship to its own entity. I have said that a personality may become another entity. There is no rule against it. It is a matter of inherent strength and ability and also of desire. Many personalities upon receiving knowledge of their entity prefer to remain part of it, though they are always independent individualities within the whole entity, as even the cells of your physical bodies are part of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 整体自体逐渐重获对其自身转世的认识，并了解自己与本体之间的关系。我曾说过，一个人格可能成为另一个本体。这并无规则禁止。这关乎内在的力量、能力，以及欲望。许多人格在得知自己所属的本体后，更愿意保持其组成部分的身份——尽管他们在整体本体中始终是独立的个体，正如你们肉体中的细胞也是整体自体的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: At such times I'm apt to think about ideas of reincarnation and counterparts. Right here I'm dealing with just two of Seth's larger concepts. But without dwelling upon them too heavily, I may consider the notion of my larger, nonphysical "whole self" or "entity" being made up of a number of other psychically related physical selves projected into time. For Seth, basically there is no time, only a great "spacious present" that's a manifestation of a sublime, indescribable All That Is. Our gross physical senses, and indeed our very bodies, insist upon interpreting the spacious present in linear terms, however--through the inevitable processes of birth, aging, and death--so to help us get his point here Seth advances his ideas of reincarnational selves and counterpart selves in ways we can understand sensually.
quotes.translation: 此时我常会思考转世与对应体的概念。这里我只涉及赛斯两个更宏大的概念。但不过分深究的话，我可以设想自己那个更宏大的、非物质的"整体自体"或"本体"，是由投射到时间中的许多其他灵性相关的物质自体所构成。对赛斯而言，时间根本不存在，只有一个伟大的"广阔当下"，那是庄严而难以言喻的"一切万有"的显化。然而我们粗重的物质感官——乃至我们的身体本身——都坚持用线性方式诠释这个广阔当下，通过出生、衰老、死亡这些不可避免的过程。因此，为了帮助我们理解他的观点，赛斯以我们能感官理解的方式提出了转世自体与对应自体的概念。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: At the end of the reincarnational cycle, the whole self is far more developed than it was before. It has realized and experienced itself in a dimension of reality unknown to it earlier, and in doing so, has of course increased its being. It is not a matter, then, of a whole self splitting in half, and then simply returning to itself.
quotes.translation: 在转世循环结束时，整体自体比之前发展得更为完善。它在一个先前未知的实相维度中认识并体验了自身，这自然扩展了它的存在。因此，这并非整体自体分裂为二后又简单回归自身的问题。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The present personality cannot travel to the complete entity, again because of these very real laws; that is, while caught in or under the influence of the field of your plane, the personality cannot travel to the entity. The personality can and should be aware of the whole self of which it is a part, and that part of the whole self which the ego ignores, is the one part which can enter into the field influence of the entity, though it cannot travel to the entity itself.
quotes.translation: 当前人格无法旅行到完整的本体，同样是因为这些非常真实的法则；也就是说，当人格被困在或受制于你所在层面的场域时，它无法旅行到本体。人格能够且应当觉察到它所属的整体自体，而自我所忽略的那部分整体自体，正是能够进入本体场域影响的那部分——尽管它无法旅行到本体本身。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When the inner ego and the outer ego pursue directly opposed viewpoints and different aims and goals, then you run into difficulty. In studying human personality and the psyche, your psychologists have not gone far, nor deeply enough. When a complete barrier, or nearly complete barrier, exists between the inner and outer egos, then the whole self is denied value fulfillment to a large degree. Such a division occurs at various times in history, and is occurring now.
quotes.translation: 当内在自我与外在自我追求截然相反的观点、不同的目的与目标时，你便会陷入困境。在研究人类人格与心灵时，你们的心理学家走得不够远，也不够深入。当内在自我与外在自我之间存在完全或近乎完全的屏障时，整体自我在很大程度上便被剥夺了价值实现。这种分裂在历史上不同时期都会发生，而此刻正在发生。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: To this degree Dunne was correct. But the important point, if you will forgive a pun, is that these moment points are all intensities, electrical realities, and traveling through such dimensions involves a transformation of energy from one intensity to another. The whole self, or the entity of which I speak, is composed of all of these selves, but it must be realized that all divisions between these selves are illusions, basically speaking. For the sake of discussion we separate them, but in doing so we almost manage to change the very nature of that which we attempt to study.
quotes.translation: 就此程度而言，邓恩是正确的。但请原谅我使用双关语，关键在于这些“瞬间点”全是强度、电性实相，穿越此类维度涉及能量从一种强度到另一种强度的转化。我所言的整体自我或存有，由所有这些自我构成，但必须认识到，基本上这些自我之间的所有划分都是幻相。为讨论之便我们将其分开，但如此做时，我们几乎改变了所试图研究对象的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Each channel will represent a portion of the self, each one existing in a different dimension, and yet all part of the whole self, or the whole tape. You can see that it would be highly ridiculous to say that the material on your Mono One was any more or any less valid than your material on Mono Two. Mono One and Mono Two could be compared then to self one and two; self one and two here, however, in the context of the ego as self one and the subconscious as you know it as self two. We are not using Dunnes terms here, in other words.
quotes.translation: 每个频道将代表自我的一部分，每个都存在于不同维度，却都是整体自我或整卷磁带的一部分。你可以看出，若说第一声道上的材料比第二声道上的材料更有效或更无效，将是极其荒谬的。第一声道与第二声道可比作自我一与自我二；不过此处自我一与自我二，是在自我为自我一、你们所知潜意识为自我二的语境中。换言之，我们并未使用邓恩的术语。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This designation does not include the entity as a whole, however. The personality does have access to the entity, but the personality does not contain the entity. In other words the whole self as it exists on your plane does not contain the entity, although communication between the entity and the whole self can and does take place by means of the inner senses.
quotes.translation: 然而，此指称并未包含作为整体的存有。人格确实能接触存有，但人格并不包含存有。换言之，存在于你们层面的整体自我并不包含存有，尽管存有与整体自我之间能且确实通过内在感官进行沟通。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In other words the apparent intensity of the egotistical reactions is a sham on the part of the ego, to hide the fact that it refuses to become involved with action as a whole, because it fears for its permanence. When the ego understands, and it will, that it is a portion of the whole self, and itself a part of action, then indeed it will not fear for its own permanence, for it will realize that being a part of action, its very nature is dependent upon change, and vitality, and value fulfillment.
quotes.translation: 换言之，自我反应的表面强度是自我方面的伪装，用以掩盖其拒绝整体参与行动的事实，因它恐惧自身恒常性。当自我理解——它终将理解——它是整体自我的一部分，且自身也是行动的一部分时，它便不再恐惧自身恒常性，因它将认识到，作为行动的一部分，其本质依赖于变化、活力与价值实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I speak as my whole self to you ... since my personality structure is more advanced than is usual for communications from other systems. Therefore, I do not need to adopt a past ego [of my own]. Perhaps because this is not necessary, the psychological bridge is required to make my messages comprehensible to Ruburt. This connecting framework does some of the translating for me that a reassembled ego would do. It delivers information to Ruburt in a way that he can understand. Occasionally [in your tests] I do impress him directly, telepathically (see Note 19), with a concept. When he receives data in the form of images the framework is operating. With my direction, this framework uses Ruburt's personal associations to direct his impressions toward the correct point. Then when we are successful I insert the right information.23
quotes.translation: 我以整体自我的身份向你们说话……因我的人格结构比来自其他系统的通常通讯更为先进。因此，我无需采用[我自己的]过往自我。或许正因无此必要，才需要心理桥梁使我的讯息能被鲁柏理解。此连接框架为我做了部分翻译工作，而重组后的自我本应完成这些工作。它以鲁柏能理解的方式将信息传递给他。偶尔[在你们的测试中]我会以心电感应方式（见注19）直接将概念印刻于他。当他以图像形式接收数据时，该框架正在运作。在我的指引下，此框架利用鲁柏的个人联想，将其印象导向正确方向。待我们成功时，我便植入正确信息。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The inner ego knows when to apply safety valves, and is aware of the danger before the outer ego is alerted. The inner ego is concerned with maintaining the foundations and balance, which is very important, of the whole self, and it is open to messages from the overall entity. The inner ego receives messages through the inner senses, and is aware of realities which the outer ego cannot afford to recognize because of its specialization. In some important aspects the outer ego is supposed to represent to some degree the subdominant personalities who still dwell in the subconscious. When the outer ego is narrow, and poorly represents these subdominant personalities then they rise up in arms, and when conditions are favorable attempt to express themselves through a momentary weakness on the part of the dominant ego. But without even doing this they may momentarily take over or express themselves through a single function, such as speech or motion, while the outer ego is blissfully unaware.
quotes.translation: 内在自我知道何时启用安全阀，在外在自我警觉之前就已察觉危险。内在自我关注的是维持整个自体的根基与平衡——这至关重要——并且它对整体存有传来的讯息保持开放。内在自我通过内在感官接收讯息，并觉察到那些因专业化而无法被外在自我承认的实相。在某些重要方面，外在自我本应在一定程度上代表仍潜藏于潜意识中的次主导人格。当外在自我变得狭隘，未能妥善代表这些次主导人格时，它们便会奋起反抗，并在条件有利时，试图通过主导自我瞬间的软弱来表现自己。但即便不这样做，它们也可能暂时接管或通过单一功能（如言语或动作）表达自己，而外在自我却浑然不觉。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: But would our time traveler ever want to give up his or her present mental and physical focus to enter completely into an earlier personality? I think not, in the overwhelming majority of cases--and perhaps never--for in those terms it would mean surrendering a portion of the whole self or entity that had, through a projection into our scheme of "present" time, attained a certain consciousness and physical form of a unique degree. Yet, on second thought I wouldn't dare rule out completely such bizarre developments. Perhaps transfers like that can and do take place within the vast arena of probable realities (which I'll also be discussing in this essay). If so, then, they would be strange only from our limited viewpoints.
quotes.translation: 但我们的时空旅人是否愿意放弃当前的心智与身体焦点，完全融入一个更早的人格？我认为在绝大多数情况下不会——或许永远也不会——因为从那些角度来看，这意味着放弃整个自体或存有的一部分，而这部分曾通过投射到我们"当下"时间的架构中，获得了某种独特程度的意识与物质形态。然而，转念一想，我不敢完全排除这种离奇发展的可能性。或许这种转移确实能在可能实相的广阔舞台上发生（我将在本文中进一步讨论）。若果真如此，那么它们仅从我们有限的视角来看才会显得怪异。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: Even in God of Jane, which was published in 1981, Jane presented some relatively late material from Seth to show that he doesn't independently communicate with others. The idea that he'd done so can be inspiring, however. In Chapter 20 of her book, see Session 876 for August 27, 1979. After explaining how a couple of women (among others) had recently claimed that he had been in contact with them, Seth stated: "Now, I did not communicate with those women--but their belief in me helped each of them use certain abilities."
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 6: Genetic Heritage and Reincarnational Predilections

quotes.text: The ego then, is only part of a much larger self, but because consciously you do not perceive the whole self you arbitrarily make a unit from a truly indivisible identity, and call this the "I." This designation, this classification, in no way affects the nature of that indivisible self. It merely affects your own conscious attitudes. You succeed in cutting off, in theory, one portion of the self from the whole self.
quotes.translation: 因此，自我只是一个更大自体的一部分，但由于你有意识地无法感知整个自体，你便武断地将一个真正不可分割的身份割裂为一个单元，并称之为"我"。这种命名、这种分类，丝毫不会影响那个不可分割自体的本质。它仅仅影响你自己的意识态度。你在理论上成功地将自体的一部分从整个自体上切断了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are, and the whole self is aware of all of these realities. With no unkindness meant, you all know yourselves and your weaknesses and failures, so why should you suppose that the self you know is the only self that you are? Surely, it has occurred to you that you have abilities you are not using, that other realities connected with your innermost existence aren't being expressed in the existence you know of.
quotes.translation: 存在着许多种实相，而整个自体知晓所有这些实相。并无冒犯之意，你们都知道自己的弱点与失败，那么为何要假设你所知的自我就是唯一的你？想必你曾意识到，自己拥有尚未运用的能力，与你最内在存在相关的其他实相，并未在你所知的这个存在中得以表达。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt picked up some communications from me last night. One which he did not get clearly was that you can take some consolation in the fact that your whole self is not as deeply affected by your present parents as you would suppose, and I promise to help you attain further important freedoms from any bad influences along this line, in a manner that will still allow you to help them without hurting yourself.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏昨晚接收到我的一些讯息。其中一条他未能清晰接收的是：你可以从这样一个事实中得到些许安慰——你的整个自体并未像你想象的那样深受你当前父母的影响。我承诺会以某种方式帮助你从这条线上的任何不良影响中获得进一步的重要自由，这种方式仍能让你在不伤害自己的前提下帮助他们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Each layer, or each area of the whole self, imagines that it is the center of awareness, and that the whole self revolves about it. So far you have had little experience with these other "centers"--you may put that in quotation marks--but before too long we shall give you some ideas so that you may become at least slightly acquainted. Initially this will be done through suggestion on a subconscious level.
quotes.translation: 整个自体的每一层或每一区域都想象自己是意识的中心，而整个自体围绕它旋转。到目前为止，你对这些其他"中心"——你可以加上引号——几乎毫无经验，但用不了多久，我们会给你一些概念，让你至少能稍有了解。最初这将通过潜意识层面的暗示来实现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Humanity dreams the same dream at once, and you have your mass world. The whole construction however is like an educational play in which you are the producers as well as the actors. There is a play within a play within a play, mazes of understanding. (Long pause.) There is no end to the within of things. The dreamer dreams and the dreamer within the dream dreams, and sometimes the dreamers are aware of each other. But the dreams are not meaningless, and the actions within them are highly significant. The whole self is the observer, and also a participator in many roles.
quotes.translation: 人类同时做着同一个梦，于是你们有了大众世界。然而整个结构就像一场教育戏剧，你们既是制片人也是演员。戏中有戏，戏中更有戏，宛如理解的迷宫。（长停顿。）事物的内在永无止境。做梦者做梦，而梦中的做梦者也在做梦，有时做梦者能感知彼此。但梦境并非毫无意义，其中的行动具有高度重要性。全我既是观察者，也是众多角色的参与者。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The ego is now somewhat in the confidence of the whole self, therefore we have more to contend with. We are no longer tricking the ego, which it would ultimately and sometimes almost disastrously resent, but taking it into the confidence of the whole self, so that it will allow departure from the physical image, as a mother can finally be convinced that it is safe for a son or daughter to go out alone.
quotes.translation: 自我现在多少已获得全我的信任，因此我们面临更多挑战。我们不再欺骗自我——这最终会招致它有时近乎灾难性的怨恨——而是让它参与全我的机密，使其允许脱离物质形象，如同母亲最终能确信子女独自外出是安全的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The whole self as you know has its existence in uncamouflaged energy, and is therefore capable of the assimilation of knowledge in so far as it can, if it chooses, be basically unaffiliated to any one camouflage dimension or perspective. In actual practice this takes a supreme development, but even for general purposes the inner self retains a freedom from camouflage perspectives, and is aware in varying degrees of other perspectives, and of its existence outside of them.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，全我存在于未伪装能量中，因此能够吸收知识——只要它愿意，本质上可以不受任何单一伪装维度或视角的束缚。实际运作中这需要至高发展，但即便为一般目的，内在自体仍保有脱离伪装视角的自由，并不同程度地觉察其他视角，以及自身在这些视角之外的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The ego however is not an afterthought disconnected from the whole self, and when the intellect becomes aware of data given to it by the intuitions or the inner self, it is then capable of informing the ego, which then changes its attitude accordingly. This way we are assured of the cooperation of the whole self, and avoid any possibility of splitting one self, one part of the self, against another.
quotes.translation: 然而自我并非与全我脱节的附加产物。当智性觉察到直觉或内在自体给予的数据时，便能告知自我，使其相应改变态度。如此我们确保全我的合作，避免自体的一部分与另一部分分裂的可能性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: They are fields within fields. In our discussion of fifth dimension, I mentioned how the vitality of the universe changes in different planes while it actually makes up the planes at the same time. In this manner also the so-called whole self and entity are connected, in this case by many diverse patterns, the inner senses being composed of the same elements of which the entity itself is composed.
quotes.translation: 它们是场中之场。在讨论第五维度时，我曾提及宇宙的生命力如何在不同层面变化，同时实际构成这些层面。同样地，所谓的全我与存有也以多种不同模式相连——内在感官由构成存有本身的相同元素组成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Projection from a dream state is something else again, therefore, and when it is executed successfully then you have a fine example of the self as it changes the focus of its own awareness. Here the critical consciousness is quite apparent, while the body sleeps. Projections occur quite naturally under these conditions. For the development of the whole self however, and for the perfection of such experiences, it is beneficial that such projections be carried out by the conscious wish of the projector. You learn therefore to manipulate your own consciousness in different realities than the ones with which you are usually concerned.
quotes.translation: 因此，从梦境出体投射是另一回事。当成功执行时，你便获得自体改变觉知焦点的绝佳范例。此时身体沉睡，批判性意识却相当清晰。在此条件下出体投射自然发生。然而为发展全我并完善此类体验，由投射者自觉意愿执行投射更为有益。你因此学会在不同于惯常关注实相的其他实相中操控自身意识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: None of these portions of the self are the whole self, obviously, and until the whole self is able to perceive its own parts simultaneously, then these seemingly separate portions of the self appear to themselves isolated to a large degree, and alone.
quotes.translation: 自我的这些部分显然都不是整体自己，只有当整体自己能够同时感知自身的各个部分时，这些看似分离的自我部分才会在很大程度上不再感到孤立与孤独。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The self grows as you use it. Its potentials always exist, on the one hand. On the other hand, if you did not utilize them they may as well not exist now, for your purposes. The whole self is being expanded, is beginning to know itself, for it always was what it will appear to be. Yet until it realizes this, its existence cannot be valid completely in terms of self knowledge or realization.
quotes.translation: 当你运用自己时，自己便随之成长。一方面，它的潜能始终存在；另一方面，如果你不去利用它们，那么对你当前的目的而言，它们就等同于不存在。整体自己正在扩展，开始认识自己，因为它始终是它将要成为的样子。然而，在它意识到这一点之前，它的存在就无法在自我认知或了悟方面完全生效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Abilities unused by the waking personality are utilized in the dream state. A study of dream activities will often allow the waking personality to recognize abilities of which it is not aware, to discover talents that are not being used. Such a study can be most beneficial in allowing the personality to utilize all of its capabilities. There is no doubt that the whole self is a composite formed by the various aspects of the personality as it is seen in the waking and dream states, and at other levels of operation.
quotes.translation: 醒时人格未加利用的能力，会在梦境状态中被运用。对梦境活动的研究，往往能让醒时人格认识到自身尚未察觉的能力，发现未被使用的天赋。这样的研究极有益处，能让该人格运用其全部能力。毫无疑问，整体自己是由人格在醒时、梦境及其他运作层面所展现的各个面向共同构成的复合体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: So the whole self turns various portions of its whole consciousness on or off, according to the field in which the whole self is endeavoring to make contact, manipulations, and according to the field in which he is endeavoring to project himself.
quotes.translation: 因此，整体自己会根据它试图建立接触、进行操控的场域，以及它试图投射自身的场域，开启或关闭其整体意识的各个部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Consider this analogy: The self as a moving circle, such as a Ferris wheel. A tree in front of the wheel will represent physical reality. The whole self, or the whole wheel, is composed of many selves in various positions, as the many people who sit on the Ferris wheel. As the wheel turns you call the person or the self who faces the tree the ego, simply because this is the portion that faces physical reality, represented by our tree. But the self who faces the tree one moment is not the self that faces it the next moment, and the operator of the wheel is never in evidence, you see.
quotes.translation: 试想这个类比：自己如同一个移动的圆环，比如摩天轮。轮前的树代表物质实相。整体自己，即整个轮子，由处于不同位置的众多自己组成，就像坐在摩天轮上的许多人。当轮子转动时，你将面对树的那个人或自己称为自我，仅仅因为这是面对物质实相（由我们的树代表）的部分。但此刻面对树的那个自己，并非下一刻面对它的那个自己，而轮子的操作者从未现身，你明白吗。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The whole self not only perceives these limitless moment points, but being a part of action, each whole self projects fragments and personalities from itself to all these points, creating therefore other egos, other intense focus points which are independent, which work out their own destinies and experiences, which in turn perceive any given moment point in slow motion.
quotes.translation: 整体自己不仅感知这些无限的当下点，而且作为行动的一部分，每个整体自己都会从自身投射出片段和人格到所有这些点上，从而创造出其他自我、其他强烈的聚焦点——这些聚焦点是独立的，它们开创自己的命运与经历，并反过来以慢动作感知任何给定的当下点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The health and psychic condition of an individual is not primarily determined by the ego, however. It is only when the ego is allowed too much power that the individual is deprived of much of the inner vitality of the whole self. For the ego is acquainted with only its role. It can find refreshment only within the limitations of the reality which it was formed to meet; and when it looks about with the best of intentions and sees disasters and terrors, it does not know that these others also play their roles, and that the roles are temporary.
quotes.translation: 然而，个体的健康与心灵状态并非主要由自我决定。只有当自我被赋予过多权力时，个体才会被剥夺全我内在的活力。因为自我只熟悉它自己的角色，只能在它被塑造来应对的现实限制内获得更新；当它怀着最善意的意图环顾四周，看到灾难与恐怖时，它不知道这些角色也在扮演各自的戏份，而且这些角色都是暂时的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: It is actually a field, that is energy field, boundary. It protects the inner self by acting as a barrier that keeps the whole self's energy controlled, and keeps it from seeping away. At the same time it protects the whole self from certain radiations which do not here concern you. No living consciousness exists on any plane without this tissue capsule enclosing it.
quotes.translation: 它实际上是一个场域，即能量场的边界。它作为一道屏障保护内在自体，控制全我的能量，防止其流失。同时，它也保护全我免受某些辐射的影响——这些辐射与你们无关。任何层面的活意识都被这层组织囊包裹着。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Through experience in the various levels of existence the inner ego and the outer ego come closer and closer together. The subconscious eventually disappears, as it is no longer needed as a necessary buffer zone. At your stage of development the inner ego is by far the most self-conscious part of the whole self, and has the greatest ability for perception and organization. It alone is capable of experiencing inner and basic reality directly and immediately. It alone can cope with the tumultuous nature of such direct reality experience.
quotes.translation: 通过在不同存在层面的经验，内在自我与外在自我越来越接近。潜意识最终会消失，因为它不再需要作为必要的缓冲地带。在你们的发展阶段，内在自我无疑是全我中最具自我意识的部分，拥有最强的感知与组织能力。唯有它能直接而即时地体验内在与基本实相，唯有它能应对这种直接实相体验的狂野本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: If you will think （I hope） for simplicity's sake of the whole self as it exists on your plane with its physical body, conscious ego and inner self as one field unit, which is also part of the larger or more complete entity as one field unit within another, then perhaps it will not be too much for you to imagine the connection, or one of the connections, between the entity field and the whole-self field, which is on your plane as being the inner senses--that is, the inner senses are one of the connectives between these two fields.
quotes.translation: 为简化起见，我希望你们将存在于你们层面的全我——包括其物质身体、意识自我与内在自体——视为一个场域单元，它同时也是更大或更完整存有的一部分，如同一个场域单元嵌套在另一个场域单元之中。这样，你们或许就能想象存有场域与全我场域之间的连接——或者说连接之一——在你们层面上正是内在感官：也就是说，内在感官是这两个场域之间的连接纽带之一。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: This out ego, among its purposes, has the duty of expressing not only itself but to a lesser extent those various hidden personalities which compose the subconscious. In larger terms and in more comprehensive terms, the whole self, the whole field of the complete subconscious and inner self, reaches back to the entity. There is no end to the past projection or existence of the subconscious of any given self; and though it is not understood in your field, there is no end to the forward thrust of the subconscious of any given self.
quotes.translation: 这个外在自我，在其诸多目的中，不仅有责任表达自身，也在较小程度上表达构成潜意识的那些隐藏人格。从更宏观、更全面的角度来看，全我——即完整潜意识与内在自体的整个场域——回溯至存有。任何特定自我的潜意识，其过去的投射或存在都没有尽头；尽管这在你们的场域中不被理解，但任何特定自我的潜意识向前推进也没有尽头。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are other self-conscious portions of the self however, with which the ego is not at all familiar, but of which the subconscious has intuitive knowledge. These self-conscious portions of the self exist in different reality systems. Before we go into our Dr. Instream material, let me remind you however that there is a whole self, composed of these various self-conscious selves, and that a portion of the self is indeed aware of the unity that exists to form the whole psychological gestalt.
quotes.translation: 然而，自体还有其他自我意识的部分，自我对此完全不熟悉，但潜意识却直觉地知晓它们。这些自体的自我意识部分存在于不同的实相系统中。在我们进入英斯特里姆博士的资料之前，请允许我提醒你们：确实存在一个由这些不同自我意识自体组成的全我，而自体的一部分确实意识到形成完整心理完形的统一性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: What you consider your consciousness, or your self, or your thinking ego, represents of course only one portion of your entire consciousness, that part which you are using at this time. It is as if, for example, consciousness of any whole self were compared to a huge, and indeed almost infinite light, with the ability inherent in the light to focus in many directions; to be diffused, as if the light had many switches that would turn it to greater or lesser intensities and directions.
quotes.translation: 你所谓的意识、自我或思考的自我，当然只代表你整体意识的一部分，即你目前正在使用的那部分。举例来说，若将任何完整自我的意识比作一个巨大、甚至近乎无限的光源，这光本身具有向多个方向聚焦的能力；它可以扩散，仿佛有许多开关能调节其强度与方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The core of the self is obviously aware of all realities to some extent. If portions of the self did not coincide then it would be impossible for the whole personality to ever operate as a unit. Here we simply have spirals, so to speak, of ever moving actions that compose the whole self. But portions of these spirals coincide, and in this analogy the spirals of action not only have those dimensions which you understand, but other dimensions with which you are not yet familiar.
quotes.translation: 自我的核心显然在某种程度上知晓所有实相。如果自我的各个部分不相重合，那么整个人格就不可能作为一个整体运作。可以说，我们这里只是由不断运动的行动螺旋构成了完整自我。但这些螺旋的部分区域是重合的，在这个类比中，行动螺旋不仅具有你所理解的维度，还拥有你尚未熟悉的其他维度。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Until this is realized your psychology will raise more questions than it answers. The basis for all experience is depth perception, and value fulfillment. The self organizes data basically in a manner that psychology has not found. The organization of such data is not simply the result of pre-adulthood tendencies, inclinations or experience. Such tendencies are highly colored by previous existences, by past lives, and this prehistory, existing as the electromagnetic property of the whole self, is the blueprint which is followed by the structure of the chromosomes.
quotes.translation: 除非认识到这一点，否则你的心理学提出的问题将比它回答的更多。所有经验的基础是深度感知与价值完成。自我组织数据的基本方式尚未被心理学发现。这种数据组织并非仅仅是成年前期倾向、偏好或经验的结果。这些倾向深受前世存在的影响，而这种作为完整自我电磁属性的史前史，正是染色体结构所遵循的蓝图。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Death is the personality's release from the physical plane, or we will use the term "the physical field," and that is all. To the ego this is a frightening future in prospect. To the ego, even sleep seems a slap in the face. Recognition in physical life of the whole self would do much to negate this death fear, since there are rather pleasant psychological experiences which are akin to the experience of death, and which would prepare the personality for this eventuality.
quotes.translation: 死亡是人格从物质层面——或我们称之为"物质场域"——的解脱，仅此而已。对自我而言，这前景令人恐惧。对自我而言，连睡眠都像一记耳光。在物质生活中认识到完整自我，将大大消除这种死亡恐惧，因为有些相当愉悦的心理体验与死亡体验相似，能为人格做好面对这种结局的准备。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In the waking state the whole self is focused toward physical reality. In the dreaming state the whole self is focused within a different dimension. It is every bit as conscious and aware.
quotes.translation: 在清醒状态中，完整自我聚焦于物质实相。在梦境状态中，完整自我聚焦于不同维度。它同样具有意识和觉知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: They changed it in their own individual ways, and not in your ways. But this will be discussed at a much later time. Yet all of this occurs, basically, within the blinking of an eyelid, so to speak, yet all with purpose and with meaning, and based upon achievement and responsibility. Each portion of the self, while independent to some considerable degree, is nevertheless responsible to every other portion of the self, and each whole self, or individuality, is responsible to all others while it is still largely independent as to activity and decision.
quotes.translation: 他们以各自独特的方式改变了它，而非你们的方式。但这将在更晚的时候讨论。然而，可以说这一切基本上都发生在眨眼之间，却都充满目的与意义，建立在成就与责任之上。自我的每个部分虽然具有相当程度的独立性，却仍对自我的其他每个部分负责；而每个完整自我或个体性，在行动与决策上仍大体独立的同时，也需对所有其他个体负责。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The paintings already exist however as definite potential forms, already created by your whole self. Only you can give them physical reality however. You can only fail in not giving them physical form, and you can only fail to give them physical form by refusing to open up your inner channels to the intuitions of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这些画作早已作为明确的潜在形式存在，由你的整体自己创造。然而，只有你能赋予它们物质实相。你唯一可能失败的方式，就是未能赋予它们物质形式；而你之所以未能赋予它们物质形式，唯一的原因是你拒绝向整体自己的直觉敞开内在通道。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (Rewritten November/2000: The vision grew out of Seth's saying in the deleted 382nd session, on November 27/67, that I'd do well known painting of Bill Gallagher. It will be based upon the conception of my painting of 1954 that I "sold to Sonja. ''see session 584 in Seth Speaks, held on May 3/71.)

quotes.text: Again, the nature of space and time is glimpsed more clearly as it appears to the sleeping self, for in the dream state reality is to a large measure uncamouflaged, and the personality appears in a freer state. It should also be borne in mind that all aspects of the personality are part of the whole self. As such there is an overall communication between the various aspects of the self, although the separate aspects of the self may not be aware of the communications.
quotes.translation: 再者，当空间与时间的本质向沉睡的自己显现时，我们能更清晰地瞥见它，因为在梦境状态中，实相在很大程度上是不加伪装的，人格也以更自由的状态呈现。同时需谨记，人格的所有面向都是整体自己的一部分。正因如此，自己的各个面向之间存在全面的沟通，尽管这些分离的面向可能并未意识到这些交流。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Your reincarnational selves have as many probable lives as you do. Your beliefs and actions in your present alter "their" experiences, as each of them, in their presents, change yours. If you see these reincarnational selves as one entity, then this becomes quite natural. The whole self is changed by all of its comprehensions.
quotes.translation: 你的转世自己拥有与你同样多的可能人生。你当下的信念与行为会改变"他们"的体验，正如他们各自在当下改变你的体验一样。若你将这些转世自己视为一个整体，这一切便显得十分自然。整体自己被它所有的领悟所改变。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: With deep trance the conscious outer state is completely switched off. Knowledge is forcibly poured down the imaginary gullet, and I can't feel very enthusiastic over such a method. What we are doing may be slower on your terms, but the effects are more durable and the whole self is aware of any knowledge thus received.
quotes.translation: 在深度出神状态下，意识的外在状态被完全关闭。知识被强行灌入想象的食道，我对这种方法实在提不起热情。以你们的时间尺度来看，我们正在做的事可能较慢，但效果更持久，且整体自己会觉察到任何以此方式接收的知识。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The upstart, for instance, may be displaying all of the bold aspects inhibited by other family members. Through this person the others may vicariously share the excitement or suspense of those experiences that are otherwise blocked. On the other hand the achiever may be completely hiding such impulses, while expressing faithfully the desires of other family members for "excellence" and discipline. Now the same can apply to counterparts, and those in your experience can show to you, in exaggerated form, comma, abilities of your own upon which you have not chosen to concentrate. You can learn much from your counterparts, therefore, and they from you. Those counterparts that you meet will be working, playing, and being more or less within your own culture. This does not mean that you are bits and pieces of some hypothetical whole self.
quotes.translation: 例如，暴发户可能展现出其他家庭成员所压抑的所有大胆面向。通过这个人，其他人能间接分享那些本被阻隔的体验所带来的兴奋或悬疑。另一方面，成就者可能完全隐藏此类冲动，却忠实地表达其他家庭成员对"卓越"与自律的渴望。同样的情况也适用于对应人物，你经验中的那些人能以夸张形式向你展示你自己尚未选择专注的能力。因此，你能从对应人物身上学到很多，他们也能从你身上学到很多。你所遇到的对应人物将在你的文化圈内工作、玩乐、生活。这并不意味着你是某个假设性整体自己的碎片。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 732
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You are all pieces, you see, of the whole; but you are not all the same pieces of the whole, but rather individualized pieces of the whole. You do not all fit together like a crossword puzzle that any idiot can put together. You are still highly individualized portions of the whole. You are the whole, but you are all highly unique. You fit into different portions of the whole. The self or structure or personality travels outward and inward and (if you will forgive me) in all directions. It is action. It constantly changes. Each self as you know it has its own abilities and inclinations and sympathies. It has its own particular place within the Pyramid Gestalt. It can contact that whole self which in your terms does not yet exist, but which is of course always present. In your search you must contact that whole portion of yourself toward which you are growing--toward which I hope you are growing. This is your individual circuit, so to speak. All ways are one way, but your way is your own way. And you can travel no other. He is--Baba--highly advanced indeed. He is a way, however; he is not the end. He is not completed. He is right, but he is wrong in taking pleasure in his rightness. (I have never been known for my own Humilitye. It ill-behooves me to speak.) Nevertheless he who is and knows that he is, is. He has no need for words and he has no need to proclaim himself, for he speaks without the necessity for words and he is heard. Those who are really heard have no need for words. I speak to you now in words because without words now, there would not be the necessary understanding that must be reached before I can become wordless.
quotes.translation: 你们都是整体的碎片，明白吗；但你们并非整体中相同的碎片，而是整体中个体化的碎片。你们并非像任何傻瓜都能拼凑的填字游戏那样严丝合缝。你们仍是整体中高度个体化的部分。你们就是整体，但你们全都高度独特。你们嵌入整体的不同部分。自己、结构或人格向外向内（请恕我直言）向所有方向旅行。它是行动。它不断变化。你所知的每个自己都有其独特的能力、倾向与共鸣。它在金字塔完形中有自己特定的位置。它能接触那个以你们的时间尺度而言尚未存在、但当然始终在场的整体自己。在你们的追寻中，你必须接触你正朝向其成长的那个整体部分——我希望你们正朝它成长。可以说，这是你们各自的回路。所有道路都是一条路，但你的路是你自己的路。你无法走其他路。他——巴巴——确实高度进化。然而，他是一条路，并非终点。他尚未完成。他是对的，但他以自己正确为乐却是错的。（我素来不以谦逊著称。由我来说这话实在不妥。）尽管如此，那个存在并知晓自身存在者，即存在。他无需言语，也无需宣告自己，因为他无需言语便能言说，且被听见。那些真正被听见者无需言语。我现在用言语对你们说话，因为若无言语，就无法达成在进入无言境界前必须获得的必要理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The stability of the whole self is dependent upon the mobility of each portion of the self. When the physical system is in good operating order, then the various portions of the self are operating properly. The fault will not always lie with the conscious or subconscious, however, but in other layers.
quotes.translation: 整体自己的稳定性取决于自己每个部分的流动性。当物质系统处于良好运作状态时，自己的各个部分便正常运作。然而，问题并不总是出在意识或潜意识层面，而是存在于其他层次中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: I am, again, not minimizing the practical necessity for the conscious self as it appears to be. But man is much more than the conscious self, and what he calls the conscious self is merely the whole self as seen through the direction in which the whole self chooses to direct its energies and focus.
quotes.translation: 我再次强调，我并非贬低意识自己在现实中的实际必要性。但人类远不止是意识自己，他所称的意识自己，不过是整体自己通过其选择聚焦能量与方向时所显现的样貌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The conscious self does not perceive, or the so-called conscious self does not perceive, the equally valid dream constructions. You will discover that the whole self is composed of many so-called conscious selves. But neither of those conscious selves are aware of the existence of the others.
quotes.translation: 意识自己无法感知——所谓的意识自己无法感知——同样真实的梦境建构。你会发现，整体自己由许多所谓的意识自己所组成，但这些意识自己彼此之间并不知道对方的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

source_raw.title: （As Seth states, Jane did have a dream about the idea the following night, September 11,1963. She recalls it quite easily. However she has no written record of the dream, since this was before she had cultivated the habit of keeping a dream notebook. As mentioned many many sessions ago, however, her poem The Fence, written in May 1963, clearly foreshadows the Seth material, dealing with [but not always by outright name] such subjects as reincarnation, dreams, unperceived worlds, etc. [See the poem on page 28, Session 5, in Volume I of The Early Sessions]

quotes.text: Once more, the field of probabilities does not consist of imaginative fancy, nor of nebulous activity. It is quite as real as the physical universe. The experiences that are encountered there by other portions of the self are used by the whole self, and the knowledge thus gains is invaluable. Not only in terms of overall experience, but also as a means of training the ego, and the subconscious, to choose between various activities.
quotes.translation: 再次强调，可能性场域并非由想象或模糊活动构成，它与物质宇宙同样真实。自己的其他部分在那里遭遇的经验，会被整体自己所运用，由此获得的知识具有无可估量的价值。这不仅关乎整体经验，更是训练自我与潜意识在不同活动之间做出选择的手段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It was composed of actual matter. As you should know, like all other atoms and molecules, its atoms and molecules had capsule comprehension, generalized consciousness. They formed themselves at Mark's instigation into a gestalt of physical construction; but the gestalt could not operate consistently or endure for any amount of physical time, in your field, because of the absence here of the greater data which is the property of the whole self, in its construction of a completed human form. This will take some reading over. Certain conditions, which we will discuss at length later, are necessary for a completely valid or effective materialization into human form.
quotes.translation: 它由实际物质构成。如你所知，与其他所有原子和分子一样，它的原子和分子具有胶囊式理解力与普遍意识。它们在马克的驱使下自行组合成物质结构的完形；但由于缺乏整体自己在构建完整人类形态时所拥有的更庞大数据，这个完形无法在你们的场域中持续运作或维持任何物质时间。这需要反复研读。某些条件——我们稍后将详细讨论——对于完全有效或成功地将人类形态物质化是必要的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Problems leading to world wars also cause worldwide natural disasters. These are merely another materialization of energy projected by those who have not learned how to handle it. Such reactions fire through the dream universe also, and are reflected through all phases of your activity. The whole self compares the performance of various portions of itself in physical reality and in dream reality, and draws its own conclusions.
quotes.translation: 导致世界大战的问题也会引发全球性自然灾害。这不过是那些尚未学会处理能量的人所投射能量的另一种物质化。此类反应也会点燃梦境宇宙，并反映在你们活动的所有层面。整体自己会将其在物质实相与梦境实相中各个部分的表现进行比较，并得出自己的结论。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Practically speaking however there are usually only three. Your own fourth-dimensional personality structure obviously operates constantly. One of the main purposes and goals of the whole self is to become aware of all such existences, and to correlate them into an identity structure.
quotes.translation: 不过实际上通常只有三个。你自身的第四度人格结构显然在持续运作。全我主要的目的与目标之一，就是觉察所有这类存在，并将它们整合成一个本体结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Now, in one sense, all selves are projections of the whole or that which is. New universes such as your own constantly come into existence. Systems and planes far different develop and in turn form other systems. Infinity has meaning only in subjective and psychic terms. The physical brain cannot contain the idea of infinity. The concept will not fit into three dimensional terms. The whole self, the inner self moves within the concept of infinity as you move within physical reality through space. Infinity contains all that will ever be known, and, of course, all that will ever be known is known within the spacious present .
quotes.translation: 现在，从某个角度来说，所有自己都是全我或"那存在者"的投射。像你们这样的新宇宙不断诞生。截然不同的系统与层面发展出来，进而形成其他系统。无限只在主观与心灵的层面具有意义。物质大脑无法容纳无限的概念——这个概念无法用三维术语表达。全我、内我在无限的概念中移动，如同你在物质实相中穿越空间移动。无限包含所有将被知晓的事物，而所有将被知晓的事物当然都在"广阔当下"中被知晓。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Now you are looking at the personality with the ego as your starting point. Other portions of the personality however perceive, or attempt to perceive, the whole self from their own starting point. The ego is seen in quite a different light when it is viewed by other portions of the self. It is not viewed--this was a poor term--as much as it was experienced, for no portion of the personality can be viewed as an object.
quotes.translation: 现在你们是以自我为起点来检视人格。但人格的其他部分却从自身起点感知（或试图感知）全我。当自我被人格的其他部分审视时，会呈现截然不同的样貌。它并非被"观看"——这个用词欠妥——而是被体验，因为人格的任何部分都无法被当作客体来观察。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: A man stands in the center of a room. When he looks to the right you say "This is my conscious self." When he looks to the left, we have something else again. You say "This is the dreaming self." The dreaming self, or if you will, the left-handed self, indeed is as important as the so-called conscious self. The whole self merely changes direction and viewpoint, and focuses its energies along a particular line.
quotes.translation: 一个人站在房间中央。当他向右看时，你说"这是我的意识自己"；当他向左看时，我们得到另一种状态，你说"这是做梦的自己"。做梦的自己（或可称为左撇子自己）确实与所谓的意识自己同等重要。全我仅是改变方向与观点，将能量聚焦于特定路径。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A part of the whole self is quite aware of the probabilities. Now. This is a portion of the self that exists as a perceiving participator, in the dimension which we discussed in our last session. This is fairly difficult material, and so I am giving it to you carefully.
quotes.translation: 全我的某部分完全觉察到可能性。现在，这是存在于我们上次课程讨论的维度中、作为感知参与者的自己部分。这是相当艰涩的教材，所以我谨慎地传授给你们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This involves efficient, complete use of the outer senses in their perception of camouflage reality, and of joyful, effective behavior and manipulation within that field of camouflage in which you spend a certain level of your existence. When you operate within it you should indeed experience it completely, in as many phases as possible, and be it to a much greater degree than is usually achieved, the conscious mind using itself then in experience, and thus knowing itself. And then the switch to use of the inner senses. The great contrast then refreshes the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这涉及在感知伪装实相时对外在感官的高效完整运用，以及在你们存在特定层次所栖身的伪装场域中，展现愉悦有效的行动与操控。当你在其中运作时，确实应该尽可能全面地体验它，并以远超寻常的程度成为它——让意识心智在体验中运用自身，从而认识自身。随后切换至内在感官的运用。这种巨大反差将使全我焕然一新。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: As a personality is molded by his exterior circumstances, so is he also molded by the dreams that he creates, and which help to form his interior or psychic environment. To the whole self there is little differentiation made between actions that are of an exterior nature, and actions that are of an interior nature. While the ego makes these distinctions, the basic core of the personality does not do so.
quotes.translation: 正如人格受外在环境塑造，它也受自身创造的梦境所塑造，这些梦境有助于形成其内在或心灵环境。对整体自己而言，外在性质的行为与内在性质的行为之间几乎没有区别。虽然自我做出这些区分，但人格的基本核心并不如此做。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It cannot maintain stability, for all its efforts, and it cannot in any way limit the self. It, the ego, merely does not perceive because it will not perceive those other perception patterns, and that larger scope with which the whole self is constantly involved.
quotes.translation: 它无法维持稳定，尽管竭尽全力，也无法以任何方式限制自己。它，即自我，只是不去感知，因为它不愿感知那些其他感知模式，以及整体自己不断参与其中的更广阔范围。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: (Voice strong and powerful:) Who is any one of us to make such demands? (Louder.) The whole development of your individuality and of your whole self is a gift of All That Is; a state of grace is the acceptance of life and vitality and joy. Live then within it!
quotes.translation: （声音强劲有力：）我们中的任何一个人，有什么资格提出这样的要求？（更大声。）你个体性和整体自己的整个发展，是万有的一份礼物；恩宠状态就是对生命、活力与喜悦的接纳。那么就活在其中吧！
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Communications exist between all portions of the self, and all parts of the personality; or parts of the whole self, rather, operate as what you may call a supraself. Ruburt has referred to this as a supraconsciousness. This is the identity, the whole identity, of the various portions of the self that operate within various systems. To this supraself, of course, your ego future can be easily viewed.
quotes.translation: 自己的所有部分与人格的所有部分之间都存在沟通；或者说，整体自己的各部分，运作成为你们所谓的超我。鲁柏曾称此为超意识。这是在不同系统中运作的自己各部分的身份，即整体身份。对这个超我而言，当然，你的自我未来可以轻易被看见。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: We are dealing here, again, merely with the various aspects of action. As a personality itself is an action gestalt, within the inner self there is a capsule comprehension of the purposes and intents of the whole personality. These are indeed within the very structure, both psychic and physical, of the personality itself. The ego, on its own as a separate unit, does not have such data, although since it is after all a portion of the whole self, it does have such information available. But when it acts as a unit it does not use such information.
quotes.translation: 我们这里再次仅涉及行动的各种面向。由于人格本身是一个行动完形，在内在自己中存在着对整体人格目的与意图的胶囊式理解。这些确实存在于人格自身的心灵与物理结构中。自我作为独立单位，并不拥有这类数据，尽管它毕竟是整体自己的一部分，确实能获得这类信息。但当它作为单位运作时，它并不使用这类信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

source_raw.title: （In Volume I of The Early Sessions this sensation, as I call it, is dealt with following Session 23, in Session 24, and following Session 25, among others. I have experienced it frequently during psychological time since then. It is much richer and more varied than the more usual thrilling one notes upon a moving occasion. In the above instance, the initial source of the sensation appeared to stem from outside the body, and the waves against my ears had a tangible, solid quality that is difficult to describe.

quotes.text: Now. Your stereophonic setting can be compared to what we have termed the inner ego. Now each of these selves experience time in their own manner, and as you should see by now this only means that they build their own realities according to the nature of their own perceptions. But the nature of their own perceptions is not chaotic. The portions of the self are so constructed, so to speak, that when the stereophonic channel is turned on the selves then know their unity. Their various realities merge in the overall perceptions of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们的立体声设置可以比作我们所说的内在自我。现在，这些自己中的每一个都以自己的方式体验时间，而你们现在应该明白，这仅意味着它们根据自身感知的性质构建自己的实相。但它们的感知性质并非混乱。可以说，自己的各部分被如此构建，以至于当立体声通道开启时，这些自己便知晓它们的统一。它们各自不同的实相在整体自己的整体感知中融合。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: This requires on the egos part an excellent ability to perceive correctly the elements of the physical situation, to express it in terms that the subconscious can understand, and to deliver the message properly. The subconscious will then break the physical data given to it down into its psychic components, translate it into symbols; and the inner self, at the request of the subconscious, will then focus all of the energies at its command to deliver the most acceptable solution, taking the entire needs of the whole self into consideration.
quotes.translation: 这要求自我部分具备卓越能力，能准确感知物质情境的要素，以潜意识可理解的方式表达，并恰当传递信息。随后潜意识会将接收到的物质数据分解为心灵成分，转化为象征符号；而内在自我在潜意识请求下，将调动所有可支配的能量，在考量整个自体的全部需求后，给出最可接受的解决方案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is also a natural tension, then, between sexes that is based on far deeper causes than physical ones. The tension results from the nature of your consciousness that arises from the anima, but depends for its continuation upon the "aggressiveness" of the animus. I have to some extent explained the fascination that one has for the other, as resulting from the inner knowledge of the whole self, that strives to attain true identity as it struggles to combine and fulfill the seemingly opposite tendencies that are a part of it.
quotes.translation: 两性之间也存在一种自然张力，其根源远比生理因素更为深远。这种张力源于你们意识的本质——它从阿尼玛中产生，却依赖阿尼姆斯的"进取性"来维持延续。我曾在一定程度上解释过两性间的吸引力，这源于整个自体的内在认知——当它试图整合并实现自身所包含的看似对立倾向时，始终在奋力追寻真实身份。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: This should lead you to understand why physical time is basically meaningless to the subconscious, and why the inner self has at its command a knowledge of past lives and past endeavors; for the inner self, dear friends, these lives are not in the past, nor is the life of the ego necessarily present to the whole self.
quotes.translation: 这应使你们理解为何物理时间对潜意识而言基本无意义，以及为何内在自我能掌握前世与过往努力的认知。亲爱的朋友们，对内在自我而言，这些生命并非存在于过去，而自我的人生对整体自体而言也未必是"当下"。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: There is communication between them but they are not aware of it. The tape is the element common to all the channels. Now. The inner ego is the director as you know, but the whole self must know itself simultaneously. It is not enough that the inner ego knows what is going on. Ultimately therefore the inner ego must itself bring about comprehension on the parts of the various portions.
quotes.translation: 它们之间存在沟通，但彼此并未察觉。磁带是所有通道共有的要素。如你们所知，内在自我是导演，但整体自体必须同时认知自身。仅凭内在自我知晓事态发展是不够的，因此内在自我最终必须促使各个部分达成理解。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I prefer that he keep highly informed. His own interests propel him in this direction, and because of the way in which we are working together, it is advantageous for him to become acquainted with as much knowledge in a number of fields as he is capable of assimilating. If we were using the very deep trance state then indeed this would not be necessary, but for your own benefits I prefer as much cooperation on your parts as possible, and like to work with an assimilation of knowledge by the whole self.
quotes.translation: 我更希望他保持高度信息灵通。他自身的兴趣推动他朝此方向发展，鉴于我们合作的方式，让他尽可能吸收多领域知识是有利的。若我们采用极深出神状态，这确实非必要，但为你们自身利益，我倾向于你们尽可能配合，并乐于通过整体自体对知识的吸收来开展工作。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: We are attempting in these sessions to develop both of your abilities in many areas, while we still maintain a most necessary balance of development so that one part of you does not get top-heavy, and topple over. I say this partially in jest, nevertheless there is a definite reason for such a steady, balanced progression. From the beginning of our sessions you have been learning the method with which we will explore the whole self, but we have not plunged headlong into any foolhardy expeditions.
quotes.translation: 在这些课程中，我们正尝试在多个领域发展你们双方的能力，同时维持最必要的发展平衡，以免你们某部分变得头重脚轻而倾覆。此言半带戏谑，但如此稳健平衡的进展确有明确理由。自课程伊始，你们便在学习探索整体自体的方法，但我们从未鲁莽地投入任何轻率的探险。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The probable system, therefore, is as complicated as the reincarnational one. Now I have told you that all action is simultaneous; therefore, on the one hand, you exist in both systems at once. However, to explain to you that decisions are involved, and to separate these events, I must simplify them to some degree. Put it this way: A portion of the whole self focuses in reincarnational cycles and handles developments there. Another portion focuses in probabilities and handles developments there.
quotes.translation: 因此，可能性系统与转世系统同样复杂。我曾告诉过你，所有行动都是同时发生的；所以一方面，你同时存在于这两个系统中。然而，为了向你解释其中涉及的决定，并将这些事件区分开来，我必须在某种程度上简化它们。这样说吧：整体自性的一个部分聚焦于转世循环，处理那里的发展；另一个部分聚焦于可能性，处理那里的发展。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Hypnosis will work well to help your physical and even mental conditions. It is after all only a means of reaching the whole self and of acquainting the ego, through effects, with the abilities of the whole self, of which it is but a part.
quotes.translation: 催眠将有效帮助你改善身体甚至心理状况。毕竟它只是达到整体自性的一种手段，并通过效果让自我认识整体自性的能力——自我只是整体自性的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The natural development of your abilities in other words already exists. You must merely be ready, intuitively alive, prepared and assured, and these developments will appear to you. (Pause.) Great artists are those who material ize physically the paintings already created by the whole self in potential form.
quotes.translation: 换言之，你能力的自然发展早已存在。你只需准备好，直觉敏锐，充满信心与笃定，这些发展便会向你显现。（停顿。）伟大的艺术家是那些将整体自性以潜在形式早已创造的画作，在物质层面具体化的人。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (Rewritten November/2000: The vision grew out of Seth's saying in the deleted 382nd session, on November 27/67, that I'd do well known painting of Bill Gallagher. It will be based upon the conception of my painting of 1954 that I "sold to Sonja. ''see session 584 in Seth Speaks, held on May 3/71.)

quotes.text: The psychology of personality cannot be grasped unless reincarnation is taken into consideration, but even then this only represents energy operating within one system. The personality operates simultaneously within many systems. Projection represents practical application. Such experience allows you to unite various aspects of the self, and to bring the whole self into sharper focus. As a rule projection in some areas can only be achieved by those who are living their last earthly cycle.
quotes.translation: 除非将转世纳入考量，否则无法理解人格心理学，但即便如此，这也仅代表能量在一个系统内的运作。人格同时在多个系统内运作。投射代表了实际应用。这类体验让你能够统合自性的不同面向，并使整体自性更清晰地聚焦。通常来说，某些领域的投射只有那些正在经历最后一世地球轮回的人才能达成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: It is your refusal to accept the whole self that causes the difficulty. Once more: Data received by the inner senses is as vivid, and in fact more vivid, than any other data you will ever receive, and the ironic part of the whole matter is that you actually receive this inner data constantly. You utilize it constantly and yet consciously you will not accept its existence.
quotes.translation: 正是你拒绝接受整体自性导致了困难。再说一次：内在感官接收到的数据与你将接收的任何其他数据一样生动，事实上更为生动，而整件事的讽刺之处在于，你实际上持续接收着这些内在数据。你持续运用它们，然而在意识层面却拒绝承认它们的存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: No action can be considered by itself. There is no solitary action. Such a possibility is basically meaningless. Nor does a tension exist in isolation. In all of these matters there is also constant pulsations of action within the outer ego, the inner ego, and all the other aspects of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 没有任何行动可以孤立看待。不存在孤立的行动。这种可能性基本上毫无意义。紧张也不会孤立存在。在所有这些事情中，外在自我、内在自我以及整体自性的所有其他面向之间，也存在着持续的行动脉动。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The soul fantasy, or spirit fantasy, arose at about this time, and has been a disadvantage to him because it gives a name and a designation to one part of the whole self, setting it up against the other part. It is this basic conception, however, that also forced him to face one truth despite himself--that of continued existence, to which he gave the word immortality.
quotes.translation: 灵魂幻想或灵性幻想大约在此时兴起，对人类而言一直是个不利因素，因为它为整体自性的某一部分命名并赋予标签，将其与另一部分对立起来。然而，正是这个基本概念迫使人类不得不面对一个真相——即存在的延续性，他们用"不朽"一词来指称它。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
