quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Now. You have become somewhat aware of the subconscious. This means that your ego has enlarged its conception of the self, of itself, to include certain activities of which it is now aware. Progress in the development of personality in the long run will be determined by the ability of the whole self to recognize and become aware of all of its self-conscious portions.
quotes.translation: 现在。你们已对潜意识略有觉察。这意味着你们的自我已扩展了对自性、对自身的认知，将目前能意识到的某些活动纳入其中。从长远来看，人格发展的进步将取决于整体自性能否识别并觉察其所有具自我意识的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The whole self or identity is aware of the experiences of all the egos, and since one identity forms these egos there is bound to be some similarities between them, and characteristics. The material that I have given you on reincarnation in the past is quite valid, particularly for working purposes, but it is a highly simplified version of what actually occurs.
quotes.translation: 整体自性或本体觉察所有自我的经验，由于同一个本体形成了这些自我，它们之间必然存在某些相似之处与特征。我过去给予你们的关于转世的资料相当有效，尤其适用于实际运作，但这只是对实际发生情况的极度简化版本。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: I can then, therefore, enter the limits of your psychic comprehension. This is a very simplified version, but I must, so to speak, therefore journey through the various areas of Ruburt's whole self, or inner self, until I reach a point where entry into your consciousness is possible. This happens to be the third undifferentiated layer of Ruburt's subconscious.
quotes.translation: 因此，我可以进入你们心灵理解的界限。这是一个极度简化的版本，但可以说，我必须穿越鲁柏整体自性或内在自性的各个领域，直到抵达一个能进入你们意识的节点。这恰好是鲁柏潜意识的第三层未分化区域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Reality is not limited. There is no past, present and future. These only appear to those who exist within three-dimensional reality. Since I am no longer within it, I can perceive what you do not see. But there is a part of you that is not imprisoned within three-dimensional reality, and that part of you knows that there is no time, that there is only an eternal now; and that part of you that knows is the whole self, the inner personality that knows all of your lives.
quotes.translation: 实相不受限制。没有过去、现在与未来。这些仅对存在于三维实相中的个体显现。由于我已不再处于其中，我能感知你们所不见之物。但你们有一部分并未被囚禁于三维实相，那部分知晓没有时间，只有永恒的当下；那知晓的部分就是整体自性，是知晓你们所有生命的内在人格。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

source_raw.title: (And once again, as she'd done for the session of last December 28, she wanted tonight's material to be presented as part of regular Session 393. I was glad to do it--and note that Jane's class sessions usually are in marked contrast to those we hold for ourselves, for books or whatever in the future. As would be expected of a gathering, class sessions were full of energy and repartee and questions and serious thinking both with and without Seth.

quotes.text: Now. Some of Fox's suggestions are excellent. They will allow you to take the waking consciousness along with you. As your abilities develop and as you become more accustomed to the experience, the waking consciousness will recall more and more, and not become frightened. When it becomes frightened you see it forces the whole experience to end. If it were not taken along the same experience might have continued, and greater benefits been achieved for the whole self.
quotes.translation: 现在。福克斯的一些建议非常出色。它们能让你们带着清醒意识一同前行。随着你们能力的发展与对体验的日渐熟悉，清醒意识将忆起越来越多，且不再恐惧。当它感到恐惧时，你们会发现它迫使整个体验终止。若未将其带入，同样的体验本可延续，为整体自性带来更大益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: When you see that the ulcer does not belong to you in these terms, then indeed you will have no purpose in using your energies to maintain it. It is not part of your heritage. It is not part of the whole self; and now, we will see the purpose of the ego in all this is to protect what it considers the self, for the ego considers itself as the only self.
quotes.translation: 当你明白溃疡并不属于你时，你便没有理由耗费精力去维持它。它并非你与生俱来的遗产，也不是整体自性的一部分。现在我们要看清，自我在这其中的目的，正是为了保护它所以为的"自己"——因为自我视自身为唯一的自性。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is true that as a rule you are not aware of your whole entity, which as a rule does not reside within your boundaries. But there is no reason why you must be blind to the whole self of your present personality, which is part of your entity, and which can be glimpsed on your plane in terms of the breathing and dreaming self of which I have spoken.
quotes.translation: 诚然，你通常无法觉察自己的整体存有——它通常并不栖居于你的界限之内。但你完全不必对当前人格的整体自性视而不见，这整体自性是你存有的一部分，在你所处的层面上，可以通过我提及的呼吸与做梦的自性窥见其貌。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: But since it is so difficult for man to even recognize the self that moves his own muscles and breathes his own breath, then I suppose it should not be startling that he cannot realize that this whole self also forms the camouflage world of physical appearance, in almost the same manner that he forms a pattern with his breath upon a glass pane.
quotes.translation: 然而，既然人类连驱动自身肌肉、呼吸自身气息的自性都难以辨认，那么他无法认识到这个整体自性同样以近乎相同的方式构建了物质世界的伪装实相——就像他在玻璃窗上呵气成形的过程——这大概也不足为奇了。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In order that you understand it is necessary, as I have told you, for me to break down concepts. In this way much of the unity of certain phenomena may escape you. We have spoken at various times about specific portions of action's manifestations. We have discussed to some degree, for example, the nature of matter, the electrical universe, the dream universe, and such other topics as the layers of the subconscious and the nature of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 如我所说，为了让你理解，我必须分解概念。如此一来，某些现象的整体性可能会从你眼前溜走。我们曾多次讨论行动显化的特定面向：例如物质本质、电性宇宙、梦境宇宙，以及潜意识层次与整体自性本质等主题。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The psychedelic experience under these circumstances transforms the ego also in beneficial ways. Otherwise the ego is left behind, unable to perform, as a rule now, its primary functions. The ego can organize the old data when it undergoes a psychedelic experience as a part of the whole self. Then it can also organize the new data.
quotes.translation: 在此情境下的迷幻体验也会以有益的方式转化自我。否则，自我将被抛在身后，无法像通常那样执行其主要功能。当自我作为整体自性的一部分经历迷幻体验时，它既能组织旧有数据，也能整合新的信息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: The whole self contains the ego, and he ignored this. Any investigations into the nature of existence, and any true learning, must take place within all levels of the self. He cut off his ego to save his soul, and nearly lost both in the bargain. The ego indeed is part of the soul. It is one of the voices of the soul. (Long pause.)
quotes.translation: 整体自性包含自我，而他却忽视了这一点。任何对存在本质的探究，任何真正的学习，都必须在自性的所有层面中进行。他切断自我以拯救灵魂，结果险些两者皆失。自我确实是灵魂的一部分，它是灵魂的声音之一。（长停顿）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: I am aware of a different kind of experience, not linear, and can focus upon and react to an infinite variety of simultaneous events. Ruburt could not express them, and so they must be leveled out into linear expression if they are to be communicated. This ability to perceive and react to unlimited simultaneous events is a basic characteristic of each whole self or entity. Therefore, I do not claim it as some feat that is exclusively my own.
quotes.translation: 我意识到一种不同于线性的经验，能够聚焦并回应无限多样的同时性事件。鲁柏无法表达这些事件，因此若要传达，就必须将它们转化为线性表达。这种感知并回应无限同时性事件的能力，是每个完整自体或存有的基本特质。因此，我并非声称这是独属于我的某种成就。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You may take a break or you may end the session. And don't say I haven't led you on a merry chase tonight, for when you reread the material you will see that I have. I cannot stress too strongly the benefits you will receive by using psychological time as I have told you. You know now what it is and how to use it to advantage. Not only will it help the physical and mental being on your plane, but it will enable you to meet the whole self.
quotes.translation: 你可以休息或结束课程。别说我没带你今晚经历一场欢快的追逐，因为当你重读这些资料时，便会发现确实如此。我无法过分强调按我所教使用心理时间将带来的益处。你现在已知其为何物，以及如何善加利用。它不仅有助于你所在层面的身心存在，更能让你遇见完整自体。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: I bring about such realignment of molecular patterns through direct manipulation. This will not be possible at your level. Even in the distant future such realignments will involve costly, complicated and almost impossible achievements because you will be trying to approach the problem working from the outside inward. The solution lies in manipulations made upon structures from the inside, or a very direct manipulation of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 我通过直接操控来重组分子模式。这在你的层面无法实现。即便在遥远的未来，这种重组也将涉及昂贵、复杂且几乎不可能达成的成就，因为你们会试图从外向内解决问题。真正的解决之道在于从内部对结构进行操控，或是对完整自体进行非常直接的操控。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: What we are looking for here, and indeed one of the purposes of our sessions, is efficient use of various portions of the self in the perceptions of their own realities, and of an overall perception of each of the various portions of the self by the whole self, which transcends the others even while it is composed of them.
quotes.translation: 我们在此追寻的——也是课程目的之一——是高效运用自体的各个部分去感知其自身实相，并由完整自体对自体各部分进行整体感知。这完整自体虽由各部分构成，却超越它们。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: You may also be part of a self operating within other fields, and operating also within another system of units. The inner self operates as a relay station, as a reference point for the various seemingly disconnected selves. It is only through contact with the inner self that knowledge of the whole self can be found.
quotes.translation: 你或许也是某个运作于其他场域、并运作于另一单位系统的自体的一部分。内在自体充当着中继站，作为各个看似不相连的自体的参照点。唯有通过与内在自体的接触，才能获得对完整自体的认知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When you let your attention waver, however, you may often fall into a state in which you momentarily perceive glimpses of another alternate present. The whole self, the soul, knows of its reality in all such systems, and you, as a part of it, are working toward the same state of self-awareness and development.
quotes.translation: 然而，当你让注意力游移时，常会坠入一种状态，短暂瞥见另一个交替的当下。完整自体——灵魂——知晓其在所有这类系统中的实相，而你作为它的一部分，正朝着相同的自我觉知与发展境界迈进。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: The self, the whole self, the entity, that is your true self, does indeed exist now. You are even in contact with it now. It is true that in one sense you have never left this self. It is also true that in another sense you have indeed. Your have purposefully explored other systems as you explore this one.
quotes.translation: 自我、整体自我、存有，那才是你真正的自己，确实存在于当下。你现在甚至与它有所接触。从某种意义上说，你确实从未离开过这个自我。但从另一种意义上说，你确实离开了。你刻意探索其他系统，正如你探索这个系统一样。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: There is no reason why mankind cannot be aware of this transformation, if once he admits into existence the whole self which makes this possible. As I mentioned earlier the process of breathing seems automatic, and yet some part of you is aware of the most minute portions of air that inflate the lungs.
quotes.translation: 人类没有理由不能意识到这种转化，只要他承认使这成为可能的整体自我的存在。正如我之前提到的，呼吸过程看似自动，但你内在的某部分却知晓充盈肺部的每一丝最细微的空气。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: When the ego is of such a rigid nature that it distorts physical reality out of all context, then however the personality had better rely upon the subconscious even in this respect, for the subconscious will at least perceive those elements of physical reality that immediately threaten the whole self.
quotes.translation: 当自我本质如此僵化，以至于完全扭曲了物质实相时，那么人格最好在这方面也依赖潜意识，因为潜意识至少会感知到那些直接威胁整体自我的物质实相元素。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: All of you have but one responsibility, and that responsibility is to the self. Not necessarily to the self as you know it but to the whole self. It is your responsibility, you see, to develop all your abilities. It is your responsibility to materialize within your own system your own potentials.
quotes.translation: 你们所有人都只有一个责任，那就是对自我的责任。不一定是对你所知的自我，而是对整体自我。你看，发展你所有的能力是你的责任。在你自己的系统内实现你自己的潜能是你的责任。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: It may be thought of in an analogy, as a shadow, in that you create it or project it, but without conscious knowledge. It is a natural consequence of your own existence. But it does not vanish when the ego blots out the inner light from the whole self. Its existence is as permanent as your own.
quotes.translation: 可以将其类比为影子，你创造或投射了它，却毫无意识。它是你自身存在的自然结果。但当自我遮蔽了来自整体自我的内在之光时，它并不会消失。它的存在与你自己一样永恒。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The whole organism operates more effectively, generally speaking, in such a position, but more than this, the whole self operates more as a single unit. The intellectual processes are to some extent diminished in other positions. This has to do as I have said with electromagnetic properties.
quotes.translation: 总体而言，整个有机体在这种姿势下运作得更有效率，但不仅如此，整体自我更像一个单一单位运作。在其他姿势下，智力过程会在某种程度上减弱。如我所说，这与电磁特性有关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The inner self could be called, then, the nucleus, the original point of action from which all the other emanations that form the whole self began. There is here you see no limitation upon the direction in which action may move, nor any limit to the dimensions which action may create.
quotes.translation: 内在自体可被称为核心，即所有构成整体自体的其他辐射的原始行动点。你看，这里对行动可能移动的方向没有任何限制，对行动可能创造的维度也没有任何限制。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Our communications are not of this type. As an overall personality, I have always been concerned with ideas. I am not emotionally in strong connection with any personalities known to Frank Watts, for example. He is a part of, or a fragment of, my whole self, and an independent one.
quotes.translation: 我们的通讯并非此类。作为一个整体人格，我一直关注理念。例如，我与弗兰克·沃茨所知的任何人格都没有强烈的情感联系。他是我的整体自体的一部分或一个片段，且是一个独立的片段。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: The event is actual all the same, and is experienced in variation. The whole self therefore perceives and is affected by probabilities, and experiences these as action, regardless of whether or not the ego has chosen to accept any given event as a physical occurrence.
quotes.translation: 事件仍然是真实的，并以变异的方式被体验。因此，整体自体感知并受概率影响，并将这些体验为行动，无论自我是否选择接受任何给定事件为物质事件。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Your own experiments in psychological time have allowed you, to some extent, to experience within yourselves such unimpeded action. You know now that the ego, because of its nature, attempts to set itself aside from action. It obviously cannot do so. The ego, being part of action, nevertheless affects the nature of action as seen in the various manifestations of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 你们在心理时间中的实验，在一定程度上让你们在自身之内体验了这种无阻碍的行动。你们现在知道，自我因其本质，试图将自己与行动分离。它显然无法做到。自我作为行动的一部分，却仍影响着行动的本质，这体现在整体自体的各种显化中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: It is a matter of Ruburt's own forces, that must always work in balance. Some rather harmless diversities of purpose, and temporary imbalance, may most probably be expected at various times while the whole self becomes acquainted with a new level of achievement.
quotes.translation: 这是鲁柏自身力量的问题，必须始终在平衡中运作。在整体自体熟悉新成就层次的过程中，很可能在不同时期出现一些相当无害的目的分歧和暂时的不平衡。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: These make up the basic identity structure of one whole self. Again, this does not mean that the portions are not independent and individual. Also, the divisions are arbitrary to a large degree, for they can indeed be carried further, for example, to the entity.
quotes.translation: 这些构成了一个整体自体的基本身份结构。再次强调，这并不意味着这些部分不是独立和个别的。此外，这些划分在很大程度上是任意的，因为它们确实可以进一步延伸，例如延伸到存有。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Men are not islands, even unto themselves. They merely perceive islands, or they perceive bits of realities. The dream correlates the various manifestations of the self with the whole portion. Dreams bring intuitive knowledge of the whole self to its own parts.
quotes.translation: 人并非孤岛，即使对他们自身而言也是如此。他们只是感知到岛屿，或感知到现实的片段。梦境将自我的各种显现与整体部分相关联。梦境将关于整体自我的直觉知识带给其各个部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

source_raw.title: （As Seth states, Jane did have a dream about the idea the following night, September 11,1963. She recalls it quite easily. However she has no written record of the dream, since this was before she had cultivated the habit of keeping a dream notebook. As mentioned many many sessions ago, however, her poem The Fence, written in May 1963, clearly foreshadows the Seth material, dealing with [but not always by outright name] such subjects as reincarnation, dreams, unperceived worlds, etc. [See the poem on page 28, Session 5, in Volume I of The Early Sessions]

quotes.text: His egotistical decisions therefore now more faithfully reflect the whole self, or the whole personality. There has been an integration. It is for this reason that his suggestions are taking hold so well, for they do not conflict with other layers of the self.
quotes.translation: 因此，他基于自我的决定现在更忠实地反映了整体自我，或整体人格。这已是一种整合。正因如此，他的暗示才能如此有效地扎根，因为它们与自我的其他层面并无冲突。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It recognizes its position as a part of the whole self. This is indeed a released, free consciousness. It does represent a giant step forward. It opens doors otherwise closed, and it automatically brings with it a state of excellent, buoyant physical health.
quotes.translation: 它认识到自身作为整体自我一部分的位置。这确实是一种释放的、自由的意识。它代表着向前迈出的一大步。它打开了原本关闭的门户，并自动带来一种极佳、充满活力的身体健康状态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: Energy cannot be imprisoned for long within one form. The individual whole self, by its very nature, will not restrain itself indefinitely to the particular set of necessities and perceptions necessary for survival within any one given field of reality.
quotes.translation: 能量无法长期被囚禁于单一形态之中。个体整体自我，就其本质而言，不会无限期地约束自己，去适应任何特定现实领域中生存所必需的那一套特定需求与感知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: What I have said applies to what you just said. In one context what you call physical reality is a dream, but in a larger context it is a dream that you have created. When you realize that you form it you come into the memory of your whole self.
quotes.translation: 我所说的适用于你刚才所言。在某个语境中，你所谓的物质现实是一场梦，但在更广阔的语境中，它是你所创造的一场梦。当你意识到你塑造了它，你便进入了对你整体自我的记忆。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: He spoke of the undiscovered man in terms of the whole self, whose abilities are so little known, and this is precisely what we are here attempting to bring to light: the vast areas within the self which have been left undiscovered and unknown.
quotes.translation: 他以整体自我的角度谈及未被发现的人，其能力鲜为人知，而这正是我们在此试图揭示的：自我内部那些尚未被发现和认知的广阔领域。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: A primary construction is a psychic gestalt, formed into matter by a consciousness of itself. Such a primary construction is an attempt to create, in the world of matter, a replica of the inner psychic construction of the whole self.
quotes.translation: 首要建构是一种心灵完形，由对自身的意识形塑为物质。这样的首要建构试图在物质世界中复制整体自性的内在心灵结构。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: This is to be expected as minor adjustments are made. Without them there would be dangers. Too much smooth sailing could then lead to overconfidence, before the whole self had mastered the controls and disciplines really necessary.
quotes.translation: 随着细微调整的进行，这是可预期的。若没有这些调整，将存在危险。过于顺遂可能导致过度自信，在整体自性真正掌握必要的控制与纪律之前。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. A more complicated, involved, intricate physical organization, such as man, necessitates on the part of the whole self a tremendous outlay of energy for maintenance of the psychic-（hyphen） physical structural relationship.
quotes.translation: 现在。像人类这样更复杂、更精细、更错综的生理组织，需要整体自性投入巨大的能量来维持心灵-（连字符）物质结构的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. The conscious mind perceives matter. Yet even then it does not perceive matter directly, but by a very indirect path, and only because the whole self directs a certain portion of its energies in that direction.
quotes.translation: 现在。意识心感知物质。然而即便如此，它并非直接感知物质，而是通过非常间接的路径，只因整体自性将其部分能量导向那个方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

source_raw.title: （As Seth states, Jane did have a dream about the idea the following night, September 11,1963. She recalls it quite easily. However she has no written record of the dream, since this was before she had cultivated the habit of keeping a dream notebook. As mentioned many many sessions ago, however, her poem The Fence, written in May 1963, clearly foreshadows the Seth material, dealing with [but not always by outright name] such subjects as reincarnation, dreams, unperceived worlds, etc. [See the poem on page 28, Session 5, in Volume I of The Early Sessions]

quotes.text: As awareness develops, so do the abilities develop that enable the whole self to handle ever-varying data, and therefore to manipulate it and function within the perspective of its meaning. There are--
quotes.translation: 随着觉知的发展，整体自性处理不断变化的数据的能力也随之发展，从而能操纵这些数据并在其意义视角内运作。存在——
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Now. These various portions of the self of which I speak are just that--portions of the whole self that simply operate in different dimensions of reality, and within different fields of activity.
quotes.translation: 现在。我所谈论的自性的这些不同部分正是如此——整体自性中那些仅在不同实相维度、不同活动领域运作的部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: ... You have a whole self, a multidimensional self of which your present personality is a small part. It is your responsibility to expand your awareness , to utilize these abilities...
quotes.translation: 你拥有一个完整的自己，一个多重次元的自己，而你现在的人格只是其中一小部分。扩展你的觉知、运用这些能力是你的责任...
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: For as many layers of the self compose the whole self, so many selves form a gestalt of which you know relatively little, and of which I am not yet prepared to tell you.
quotes.translation: 因为构成完整自己的自我层如此之多，这些自我便形成了一个你相对知之甚少的完形，而我尚未准备好告诉你更多。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: That part of us as you know which deals with these roles is the ego, which lives intimately the role which was assigned to it by the whole self, of which it is a part.
quotes.translation: 你所知的那部分处理这些角色的自我是自我意识，它亲密地活在被完整自己指派给它的角色中，而它正是完整自己的一部分。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: The subconscious is a self-conscious portion of the whole self. It is called subconscious because the ego as a rule is not conscious of it.
quotes.translation: 潜意识是完整自己中具有自我意识的部分。它被称为潜意识，是因为自我意识通常对它没有觉知。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: It is true that the whole personality, or whole self, does not directly manifest itself within physical reality.
quotes.translation: 确实，完整人格或完整自己并不会直接显现在物质实相中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
